Off Calendar Aug-15-2014 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-28-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Against Pltff Gregory Holtz
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Fitzpatrick Vannucci, Esq., 415.981.7500, for plaintiff Gregory Holtz.
Gary Miller, Esq., 312.704.7703, and Andrew Castricone, Esq., 415.986.5900, for defendant/cross complainant Groupon, Inc.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT GROUPON, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/Adjudication is denied in its entirety. There is a triable issue of material fact regarding whether defendant is immune from liability pursuant to 47 USC sec. 230. Specifically, there is a dispute of fact regarding whether defendant created the information at issue (or materially contributed to its creation) or whether "the information at issue [was] provided by another information content provider.'" Delfino v. Agilent Technologies, Inc. (2006) 145 Cal.App.4th 790, 804-805. There is a triable issue of material fact as to the sixth cause of action for violation of CC 3344. A dispute of fact exists whether defendant should be treated like the owner/mere webhost or the advertiser/creator of the information. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
